programme.title: Movie: Insurgent
programme.desc: In the wake of the uprising, Tris Prior finds herself on the run, along with Four, as they flee the leaders of the Erudite faction. They search for answers as they try to figure out what it was that Tris' loved ones sacrificed their lives to protect.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, the Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Bones: The Heiress in the Hill
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of Lauren Frank, a kidnapping victim whose remains were found buried at a park. When they discover the unhappy relationship that Lauren had with her stepmother, the team starts to think the killer could be someone closer.

programme.title: Bones: The Source in the Sludge
programme.desc: When a CIA informant is found murdered, Booth and CIA Agent Danny Beck must work together to track down an Afghani terrorist. Brennan wants to work more closely with Booth in the field, and the duo must confront the implications of what that means.

programme.title: Bones: The Repo Man in the Septic Tank
programme.desc: A repo man's remains are found in a septic tank, and the Jeffersonian team must work together to figure out who the killer is. When the team discovers that the victim had a troubled past, some key witnesses from his earlier days become potential suspects.

programme.title: Movie: The Accountant
programme.desc: Christian Wolff is a math savant that becomes a freelance accountant for crime organizations. To appear legitimate, he takes on a legal client, a robotics company. He helps a young accountant clerk investigate a discrepancy, which places them in danger.

programme.title: Movie: The Town
programme.desc: While planning his next bank heist, a career criminal juggles his feelings for a bank manager from a previous robbery.

programme.title: Arrow: Schism
programme.desc: Oliver teams up with a surprising force in an attempt to stop Darhk and his magic once and for all.

programme.title: Arrow: Legacy
programme.desc: Oliver tries to balance his jobs as both mayor and protector of Star City, all while trying to form a new team.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Man on Fire
programme.desc: After a decorated petty officer is found dead inside a sports arena, evidence leads Pride and the team to a kidnapping case of a petty officer who was last seen in Mexico.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The team must rescue one of their own after Sebastian is kidnapped while at a restaurant with his mother. While being held by his captors, he's forced to use his gaming skills in a prison break.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Course Correction
programme.desc: NCIS and the FBI investigate a private plane crash in the bayou that killed three sailors. Also, Sonja and Lasalle interview candidates for the team's open agent position.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Stolen Valor
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a retired SEAL who tracked down individuals impersonating military personnel. But the case takes a mysterious turn when the lead suspect is found with the Navy issued jacket of an officer killed in Afghanistan.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Baitfish
programme.desc: The team investigates a deadly explosion at the Navy-Marine Corps Relief Gala event they were attending. They discover that Pride was the intended target of the bomb.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Abyss
programme.desc: When a navy Admiral's daughter is the prime suspect in double murders aboard a research boat, the team partners with the Coast Guard Investigative Service to work the case. Meanwhile, Lasalle tracks down his estranged brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A navy lieutenant commander in impeccable shape turns to Pride and the team to solve his imminent murder after discovering he has been poisoned with a lethal dose of radiation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: After an NCIS agent is killed during security detail for the Vice Chief of Naval Operations, the team must determine if this was assassination or if someone is targeting one of their own. Meanwhile, Agent Brody is placed under investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Le Carnivale de la Mort
programme.desc: After a Petty Officer is found murdered in the midst of Mardi Gras events, the team investigates what parades and parties led to his untimely death. Also, Pride must decide what aspects of his strained relationship with his father he is willing to share.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: After a Navy recruiter is the target of a lethal hit and run, the team investigates whether the murder was tied to her career or her role as a foster mother to two brothers. Also, Lasalle grows increasingly concerned for his brother's welfare.

programme.title: Movie: Heaven Is for Real

programme.title: Movie: San Andreas

programme.desc: Fearing that she is being stalked, a young woman takes comfort in a handsome detective unaware that her stalker is closer than ever.

programme.title: Movie: Stalked by My Doctor
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is miraculously saved by a heart surgeon, the doctor begins to flirt with her. Her father doesn’t believe her. Unbeknownst to all, the doctor is obsessed with the girl, and he fakes her death, so he can have her to himself.

programme.title: Movie: Stalked by My Mom
programme.desc: A teenager's mother begins stalking her after she discovers that her daughter has developed feelings for a college boy.

programme.title: Movie: His Perfect Obsession
programme.desc: A blind-teenager and her mother travel to her mom’s home town for a funeral. During the service, they meet a strange accountant, when mayhem ensues, the teen is the tasked with saving herself, and her mother.

programme.title: Movie: My Nightmare Landlord
programme.desc: After moving into a new apartment since breaking up with her boyfriend, a woman begins to have problems with her landlord.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredge Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: With a massive storm about to hit Nome, Shawn and Ken push their operations to the brink to get one last score in. Emily gambles on untested ground. Kris battles bad attitudes. One dredge pushes too far into the storm, forcing its crew to abandon ship.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dive Hard With a Vengeance
programme.desc: After the raging storm, Ken learns the Myrtle Irene's fate. Shawn uses a new tool to hunt for new hotspots. Emily brings on a new crew member from her past. Vernon tries his luck at river mining. Kris gambles on an alliance to turn his season around.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Gold is Thicker Than Blood
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: Shawn confronts his dad and Emily brings hers aboard the Eroica. Meanwhile, Vernon looks for a replacement diver.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Heat is Off
programme.desc: As summer's end approaches, Shawn claws his way closer to the top of the gold count. Emily leaves her unpredictable father to tend on the Eroica. Kris works his new partnership in pursuit of a brighter future. Ken pushes the repaired Myrtle Irene.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Shots Fired
programme.desc: Clayton must haul his 20,000-pound dinosaur fossil over 200 miles to a lab where it will finally be identified. The Harris/Bolan clan chases poachers off of their land and Jared makes a last-ditch effort to bring in some money this season.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: US Navy vs. UFO

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dairy Cow Midwife
programme.desc: In Indiana, Mike learns how to milk, clean, and inseminate cows, and he delivers calves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Don't Show the Goodies
programme.desc: Stephanie has a big budget and wants a show-stopper dress for her second marriage. Courtney Burson is back and she may have finally made up her mind about a dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The WAG
programme.desc: Bride Lyndzie believes she was royalty in a past life and this WAG intends to have a royal wedding in this life. Bride Ashley wants a dress that's not too revealing so her mom won't have a heart attack.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cheetah Bride
programme.desc: Sabrina Bryan of 'The Cheetah Girls' has a dress-shopping date with designer Hayley Paige and one of Kleinfeld's own consultants is going to be a bride herself!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not with Those Chubby Arms
programme.desc: Angelica is looking for the perfect strapless gown but her mom thinks her arms are 'too chubby' to be seen! Tiffany and her crew of gospel singers are preparing for her holy matrimony.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bionic Bride
programme.desc: Crystal and her sisters have some severe sibling rivalry. Will she be able to rise above it to find the perfect dress? Rebekah is known as the bionic model because of her prosthetic arm. Randy makes it his mission to find her a dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Walk Down the Aisle
programme.desc: Emily needs a form-fitting dress to walk down the aisle with her fiancé, who will be taking some of his first steps after being paralyzed in a football accident. Tanya is an artist whose vision of a dress eludes Randy and Albany.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Showtime
programme.desc: It's a star studded premiere as Jenna and Val from "Dancing With the Stars" waltz into Kleinfeld to find her dream dress. WWE Hall of Famer Mick Foley steps out of the ring to help his friend Heather find a last minute dress after hers is ruined.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm the Evil Mom Here
programme.desc: Samantha's already shopped at 100 different bridal stores without ever finding the right dress and her bullying mom is not helping. Last Minute Lia, on the other hand, has never tried a single gown and has to leave with one today.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 200% Trouble With This Dress
programme.desc: It's all about the bling when Samantha falls for a dress that's twice her budget. Krystina wants simple while her mom wants over the top. Shannon ordered a custom gown for her Irish I do's.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Not on the Guest List
programme.desc: Kayla comes to Kleinfeld with her family to find her dream wedding dress but with one catch: they're not invited to the wedding! Dori wants to show her own style with a new dress while mom and Mama Dolly strongly encourage her to wear their 1950s gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy Will Show You The Door
programme.desc: Bridal model Jessica is depending on her feisty friends to help her make a decision, but when they get out of control Randy has to step in. New mom Marlo is back with her outspoken twin Margo and hopes she can keep her brutally honest comments in check.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Love at First Flight
programme.desc: Pnina megafan Julianna wants the sexiest dress ever but her fiancé's family are afraid she'll say yes to a dress she'll regret. Plus, jumpsuit enthusiast Randell wants a wedding onesie - too bad Randy and Lisa can't find any.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cinderella Gone Wrong
programme.desc: After losing her dress in the California wildfires, Eryka comes to Kleinfeld hoping she can fall in love with a new dress. Shay helps Ashley feel sexy after losing over 100 pounds. Randy helps a desperate bride whose dress has disappeared.

programme.desc: A merciless alien race hunts a group of elite warriors in the jungle. In order to survive, the group must learn more about the aliens and how to defeat them.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: The styles of dance Murr claims to be skilled in. The Joker that recently became a published author.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Orlando Leyba Headlines

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Art

programme.desc: Adam shows that Columbus didn't discover America, King Tut was a dud, and the rules of grammar are not as ironclad as you'd think.

programme.title: House: Black Hole
programme.desc: The team takes on the case of a high school senior who inexplicably blacked out during a class field trip. After exhausting a number of ineffective treatments for her mysterious ailments, House attempts one last controversial approach to diagnose her.

programme.title: House: Lockdown
programme.desc: When a newborn disappears from the nursery, Princeton Plainsboro goes on lockdown, preventing anyone from entering, leaving or moving within the hospital. House and his team members are left trapped in various parts of the building and secrets come out.

programme.title: House: Knight Fall
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of Sir William, a knight in a closed-off community of men and women living according to the ideals of the High Renaissance. The team searches the medieval village for environmental factors.

programme.title: House: Open and Shut
programme.desc: House and the team take on the case of a woman who is in an open marriage and becomes ill during a date with her on-the-side boyfriend. As perplexing as the case is, she is happy and healthy, yet her polygamous relationship is baffling to the team.

programme.title: House: The Choice
programme.desc: The team takes on the case of an ailing groom-to-be who harbours undisclosed secrets from a previous relationship. As his fiancée tries to get answers to her many questions, a frustrated team narrows down the possibilities.

programme.title: House: Baggage
programme.desc: A woman arrives at the Princeton Plainsboro emergency room with an unexplained illness and no recollection of who she is. While trying to solve the mystery of the woman's illness, House must also help her piece together her identity.

programme.title: House: Help Me
programme.desc: Cuddy, House and members of the team join forces with a search-and-rescue team to provide much-needed medical attention at the scene of an emergency.

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Madea and her friends are asked to watch her great-niece on Halloween. As the night goes on they are plagued by supernatural events. Madea has to keep the teens out of trouble while fending off a number of paranormal threats like ghosts and zombies.

programme.title: Movie: Boo 2! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: When the kids go to a Halloween party at a haunted campground were a number of murders were once committed, Madea, Bam and Hattie set out to bring them home before anything bad can happen to them, but a chainsaw-wielding killer gets there before they do.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Recipes
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin
programme.desc: This trip Guy's into all sorts of amazing Latin specialties from Peru to Panama to elsewhere.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Griddles n' Vittles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northern Southern
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing Southern flavour without ever hittin' the South. In Cambridge, Mass., a funky joint fryin' up Nashville hot chicken and cookin' up gangster gumbo. A smokin' spot in Sparks, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Dishes
programme.desc: Guy takes on unique eats. In Honolulu, a Jamaican joints serves up jerk chicken wings and goat curry. In Arlington, it's potato pancake stuffed with beef. And in Las Vegas, a taco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bringin' It Home
programme.desc: Guy visits a local joint in California to try homemade Tuscan-style Italian food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Land to Sea
programme.desc: Guy samples from the land and the sea, including stops in Syracuse and Kitty Hawk.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Food Done Right
programme.desc: Guy's diggin' into food made the right way, including clam cakes and cheesefries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavortown International
programme.desc: Guy goes global with flavours from all over the world. In Warr Acres, Oklahoma, a Middle Eastern smorgasbord serves standout samosas and chicken kebab. A funky spot in Portland, Oregon turns out real-deal Mexican tortas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Time Attitude
programme.desc: Guy explores a diner that serves an old-school Southern classic: meat and three sides.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Rings and Fries
programme.desc: Guy Fieri uncovers the best places to buy the All American meal: burgers and fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Mozz to Matzo Balls
programme.desc: A 1920's candy and ice cream place that's added mozzarella sticks and rigatoni.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Succulent Sandwiches
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into succulent sandwiches! In Oakland, a real-deal butchery stacking up killer cheesesteak and off-the-chain chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Tacos and Dogs
programme.desc: Guy samples great food in Houston, TX and a joint in a grocery store offers wild toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavortown International
programme.desc: Guy goes global with flavours from all over the world. In Warr Acres, Oklahoma, a Middle Eastern smorgasbord serves standout samosas and chicken kebab. A funky spot in Portland, Oregon turns out real-deal Mexican tortas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Atlantic to Pacific
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting a far-out taste of both coasts. In Bakersfield, Calif., a 75-year-old steakhouse fires up savoury stuffed pork chops and legit lobster mac 'n' cheese. Across town, a Latin-American fusion joint cranks out chicken and tri-tip.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Finger Lickin' Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is eating up grub that doesn't require a knife and fork! In Atlanta, a funky old house turned brew pub cookin' up cheddarwurst corn dogs along with a knockout pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Between the Bread
programme.desc: Guy's grabbin' grub piled high on bread and buns. In Colorado Springs, a funky joint is going scratch-made and local with their Pueblo chili burger and a hangover specialty. Then, Guy visits a family-run sandwich shop in Washington D.C.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hot Meat and Cool Veg
programme.desc: Modesto, Calif. has Portuguese sausage and lamb burgers. Oakland has a vegan joint with okra gumbo. Also, wings and pork rinds in Islamorada, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Serious Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy tries out righteous sandwiches in this episode. In Austin, a gourmet sandwich shop serves up duck pastrami and a knuckle sandwich. In Vegas, a roast beef po boy is done the Cajun way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Porktastic
programme.desc: Smoked tasso and Southwest Louisiana boudin sausage; Napoletana pizza place in TX.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: What's for Breakfast?
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out breakfast places such as a juice bar making bagels from scratch, and a roadhouse mixing Philly food with Southwestern favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gone Global
programme.desc: Guy tries a Venezuelan sandwich loaded with shredded beef, black beans, and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Where the Locals Eat
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers some great local favourites in Memphis, Virginia and Omaha.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: On a Roll
programme.desc: Rachael Ray's French dip cheeseburgers on brioche rolls use the elements of French onion soup to take a cheeseburger to the next level.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bayou Bash Brunch
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites Louisiana native and actress Faith Ford over for a brunch that makes them feel like they're in the Big Easy. Valerie makes green tomato Benedict and easy cajun hollandaise, olive salad, hurricane mimosas and bananas foster.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Our Brightest Summer Dishes
programme.desc: The Kitchen is sharing a bright and colourful spread of the best summer flavours starting with Geoffrey's hanger steak with grilled salsa and Katie Lee's farmers market flat bread. Jeff and Geoffrey also make cool dips to beat the heat.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Graduation Picnic
programme.desc: It's a family get-together to celebrate the graduations of Trisha's niece and nephew.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Birthday Boys
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is celebrating two birthdays on the farm: her husband, Nick, and his dad, Roger. She's making a lunch menu that features both of their favorites, starting with Nick's favorite chicken shawarma tacos served with a tasty Moroccan carrot salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 8
programme.desc: Ree has a day of cooking, cattle working and a real cowboy lunch at the ranch, shot by her kid crew. Ree makes crispy breaded easy pork chops, amazing smashed potatoes and baked beans with peppers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Camping at the Creek
programme.desc: Ladd's mom is taking all the kids and cousins for a fun night out camping under canvass at the creek. Ree whips up delicious food for them to cook over the campfire in the great outdoors.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Sun's Out, Buns Out
programme.desc: The summer sun and buns are out, burger, sandwich and hot dog buns, that is. Geoffrey shares his tips for a moist and flavourful mushroom turkey burger while Katie makes a meatless grilled halloumi sandwich with watermelon relish.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Pizza and Pasta 101
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and her daughter, Jade, love nothing more than a day at home making pizza and pasta. Together they make a Chicago-style deep dish cheese pizza plus summery spaghetti with lemon zucchini and lemon strawberry sundaes for dessert.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Beefed Up
programme.desc: Ina Garten is setting her sights on beef and sharing her tips for preparing it roasted, ground, sliced, sauteed and seared just like a pro. She starts with the perfect steak, an easy and elegant filet mignon with mustard and mushrooms.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Family Tournament Part 1
programme.desc: Food and family collide as Guy Fieri brings three DDD family duos to Flavortown to compete. First, they shop for ingredients using only their bare hands.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Family Tournament Part 2
programme.desc: The tournament continues with families from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives. Guy Fieri is challenging these dynamic family duos make classic culinary duos, starting with a list of key ingredients they must feature in their burgers and fries.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Family Tournament Part 3
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings three DDD family duos to compete in Flavortown for the last spot in the tournament finale. He gives them a weight limit as they shop for their fish and chips dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD Family Tournament Finale
programme.desc: Three families compete in two games that will decide who wins the DDD Family Tournament and the $20,000 prize.

programme.desc: Luis 'Lue' Elizondo, who ran the U.S. government's $22 million secret UFO program leads the team and reveals new details about his Pentagon investigation, which includes new leads. U.S. Navy fight pilots reveal new details about the 'tic-tac' shaped UFO.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside America's UFO Investigation: Raining UFOs

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside America's UFO Investigation: The Atomic Connection
programme.desc: An encounter in America's heartland indicates a disturbing twist to the UFO phenomenon. The team follows a trail connecting UFOs to the most destructive weapons in human history. A former U.S. Air Force Colonel shares an encounter on Christmas Eve 1980.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside America's UFO Investigation: The Revelation
programme.desc: The investigation uncovers shocking video evidence, patterns, secret coordinates and jarring eyewitness testimonies about UFOs. The team follows a lead to an allied European country to probe a case where a UFO allegedly shot down a helicopter, and more.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Everything She Knew
programme.desc: Amber Belken was a young woman with big dreams. Then, she was found murdered. Was Amber the victim of a robbery gone wrong or was this brutal crime personal? Three people knew the truth. Two of them would risk their lives to reveal it.

programme.desc: A sexy teacher and her teenaged lover hatch a plot that rocks a nation.

programme.desc: Police unravel the mystery of a former Vegas showgirl, a dismembered body and a missing husband.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: A Matter of Faith

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Fetish

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: In the Fire
programme.desc: Firefighters discover the charred remains of a young wife and mother but the flames didn't kill her. She sustained a gunshot wound to the head and the evidence points to suicide. Loved ones argue it's a case of murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Cop's Wife

programme.title: Snapped: Kari Willoughby

programme.title: Snapped: Cindy McKay

programme.title: Cold Justice: Digging for Answers
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve head to Oregon to help solve the 1993 murder of a young man allegedly shot and buried by a group of dangerous criminals. They'll need to pit them against each other to crack the case and finally bring justice to his family.

programme.title: Cold Justice: A Family's Nightmare
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey search for new clues in the fatal shooting of a mother of six that was initially considered a suicide. Their investigation exposes a heart-breaking trail of secrets hidden for 25 years.

programme.title: Movie: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A boy wakes up in an ascending elevator with no memory of who he is or how he got there. He joins a group of other boys trapped in an enclosed area surrounded by an enormous maze. His only hope for escape is by piecing together clues about his past.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Realty Bites
programme.desc: Marge is tired of working around the house and decides to pursue a real estate career.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Miracle on Evergreen Terrace
programme.desc: When Bart wakes up early on Christmas morning to play with his presents, he accidentally burns down the family's Christmas tree and ruins all the gifts. To cover his tracks, he buries the evidence in the yard and tells the family he saw a burglar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All Singing, All Dancing
programme.desc: Homer sings the blues when he realizes that a 'shoot'em-up' movie is really a musical. The rest of the family uses flashbacks to remind him about how many times he and others Springfield residents have broken into song and dance.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Carney
programme.desc: Homer invites carnies to live with his family, but they steal the Simpsons' home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Joy of Sect
programme.desc: Homer is brainwashed into joining a cult that is taking over Springfield. The family moves to an agricultural compound to pick beans, but Marge manages to escape and sets out to deprogram her loved ones.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Das Bus
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa are in a United Nations club with other kids and set out on a field trip. An accident results in the students becoming stranded on a deserted island. Meanwhile, Homer decides to create his own Internet company.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Temptation of Krusty
programme.desc: Bart pleads with Jay Leno to include Krusty as part of a charity stand-up comedy event, but Krusty's typical routine bombs. While announcing his retirement, Krusty's brutal honesty wins over the crowd and he soon finds his career is rejuvenated.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dumbbell Indemnity
programme.desc: Moe and Homer hatch an insurance scam to get money for Moe's new girlfriend, Renee.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Simpson
programme.desc: Lisa begins to fear that the Simpson gene is causing her to grow stupid. Homer tries to comfort her by reuniting every Simpson and asking them what they do. Meanwhile, Apu senses a business opportunity when Abe's friend freezes himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: This Little Wiggy
programme.desc: Bart and Ralph Wiggum go on an adventure when they find a master key to the city.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Tweentrepreneurs
programme.desc: Tina, Louise and Gene get a taste of business when they join the school's Tweentrepeneurs club. Back at the restaurant, Bob and Linda find themselves outsmarted by a dine-and-dasher.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Live and Let Fly
programme.desc: The kids learn the dangers of revenge when their plan to get back at the school guidance counselor gets them entangled in a deep rooted sibling rivalry between two pilots.

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor
programme.desc: Peter encourages Meg to attend a high school party, where she takes up drinking, which both concerns and delights her father. Meanwhile, Brian begins spying on his neighbors and suspects Principal Shepherd of a crime.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian get into a friendship-ending fight after Brian commits a terrible act to one of Stewie's beloved toys. Meanwhile, Peter refuses to wash his hand after meeting his favourite breakfast cereal mascot, Boo Berry.

programme.title: Archer: Edie's Wedding
programme.desc: Pam takes Archer to her sister's wedding but gets side-tracked with technical difficulties.

programme.title: Archer: Vision Quest
programme.desc: The gang gets to work early so they can spend some quality time together.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden Cities of the Maya
programme.desc: A young boy makes international headlines when he uses satellite images to discover lost cities of the Maya. Satellite images might point to a modern-day genocide. Trees in China seem to be spelling out a sinister message.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Treasure of the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Strange spots near the Grand Canyon may hold clues to the legendary treasure of a notorious bandit. Satellite images could explain desert ruins rumored to be an entrance to an underworld. A city-size chunk of ice suddenly disappears in Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden City of Inca Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters have searched for a lost Incan city of untold wealth for a century, but new technology might finally locate its riches. A strange mountain in Egypt sparks an investigation into Cleopatra's gems and the tomb of Alexander the Great.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: Open Source Money: Looking Down the Barrel
programme.desc: Dragonchain enters a new phase as it is forced to fight for its survival. Industry leaders Perianne Boring and Brock Pierce discuss the impact of the US Govt on innovation in the US. Joe retreats to the mountains to blow off steam the American Way.

programme.title: How It's Made: Kitchen Accessories, Vacuums, Paper Mache, Hydraulic Cylinders
programme.desc: Find out how kitchen accessories, central vacuums, paper mache animals, and hydraulic cylinders are made.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit
programme.desc: A strange circular forest is found next to a notorious cannibal site. Then, when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of Blood
programme.desc: An ancient man-made volcano might reveal buried treasure and bloody human sacrifice. When NASA discovers a strange pattern in the Arctic ice, experts investigate if it has alien origins. A mystery in the Sahara might have a sinister explanation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Cave to Hell
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: American Monster: Two Families
programme.desc: Unraveling the mystery behind the confusing evidence at the scene of April Holton's tragic murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life - as these never-before-aired home videos attest. But blind greed would bring about the destruction of this loving family.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Never Forget
programme.desc: NCIS agents solve the cold case murder of 10-year-old Tammy Welch after three decades. Then, the murder case of Ricky Wiltrout, son of a Naval officer is solved. It would take six years to reveal the truth about why Ricky was killed.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: Billionaire Predator
programme.desc: Reclusive billionaire Jeffrey Epstein's early years are marked by a drive to amass wealth, power, and influential friends. But in 2005, his secrets are revealed when he's accused of the sexual assault of multiple underage girls.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: The Inner Circle
programme.desc: Jeffrey Epstein leverages his considerable power and influence to avoid serious repercussions from sexual assault charges in Florida. And the accused pedophile continues to add elites to his growing social circle, including royalty.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: Suicide or Murder?
programme.desc: In July 2019, Jeffrey Epstein is arrested for sex trafficking, and weeks later, he's found dying in his prison cell. When the official ruling of suicide is questioned, conspiracy theories take on new life.

programme.title: Who Killed Jeffrey Epstein?: Billionaire Predator
programme.desc: Reclusive billionaire Jeffrey Epstein's early years are marked by a drive to amass wealth, power, and influential friends. But in 2005, his secrets are revealed when he's accused of the sexual assault of multiple underage girls.

programme.desc: In July 2019, Jeffrey Epstein is arrested for sex trafficking, and weeks later, he's found dying in his prison cell. When the official ruling of suicide is questioned, conspiracy theories take on new life.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Never Forget
programme.desc: NCIS agents solve the cold case murder of 10-year-old Tammy Welch after three decades. Then, the murder case of Ricky Wiltrout, son of a Naval officer is solved. It would take six years to reveal the truth about why Ricky was killed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened to Rachael?
programme.desc: A year after a young teacher was gunned down outside of her Pennsylvania home, there is still no arrest and many wonder if this case will ever be solved.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Reality Kills
programme.desc: Erin Moriarty investigates whether an Atlanta police detective botch an alleged murder investigation because television cameras were rolling.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Amy Gellert?
programme.desc: Amy Gellert was just 21 when she interrupted an intruder holding he parents hostage in their Florida home. Startled by the headlights of her car, the man brutally stabbed her parents and then killed her. Her parents survived, but Amy never made it inside.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: A Palm Beach socialite kills her husband, and then 20 years later, the same gun is used in another shooting in the family.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: Two daughters are determined to find their mother's killer and if she knew who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Body in the SUV
programme.desc: When the badly decomposed body of Margarita Scott is found in the backseat of her estranged husband's missing SUV, investigators must interview everyone close to her to retrace her final steps.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Footprints in the Snow
programme.desc: When a small-town Michigan couple is gunned down in their own home, footprints in the snow and loose lips will lead police to their killer.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Man in the Background
programme.desc: When two young girls arrive home from school ten days before Christmas to find their father dead, police are able to narrow down the timeline of the murder to an eight-minute window, just before the girls walked in the door.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Game Over
programme.desc: In 1994, high school coach Mike Bernos was found dead in a recliner, his body riddled with 15 bullets. His adopted son, Daniel Blan, was convicted of the murder. Now Daniel's wife and childhood friend are fighting for his freedom.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: When the Gun Went Off
programme.desc: When Kathy Middleton died of a gunshot in her own home, police had three options: it was an accident, suicide, or her husband, Ken, killed her. After deciding on option three, Ken's now doing life but his family insists he was wrongfully convicted.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: It Wasn't Me
programme.desc: In 1992, Roosevelt Myles, a small-time drug dealer, is convicted of murdering a teenage boy on Chicago's West Side. Now, his sister and fiancée have reached out to Chris and Fatima, convinced he is serving time for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Obsessed with Celeste
programme.desc: 75-year-old retired TV executive Steven Beard is shot in his own home, but his wife, Celeste Beard, didn't pull the trigger. So why is she in prison for his murder? Her mom and husband are hoping Chris and Fatima can find out.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lust to Dust
programme.desc: After her husband dies suddenly, a woman becomes the relentless target of her overly flirtatious neighbor. When her brother moves in to protect her, he's put on a collision course with the neighbor that will only be resolved with bloodshed.

programme.title: Russian Arms Dealer
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb.'

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make It in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Jeremy Woods convinced his girlfriend to forge bad checks and then murdered her and her son.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Roll the Dice
programme.desc: With 41 arrests and no convictions, Philip Williams had no worries that stabbing his ex in a parking lot would give him any trouble. But when he became a wanted man, he hit the road. Surviving on his gambling wins, Williams kept on the move.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Pen Pal
programme.desc: Brenda Wynn is out of prison, and wants a new life. But when a co-worker steels her money, she snaps and hits him with her car. Wynn does all she can to stay out of jail by using fake credit cards and conning men into giving her money.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through a Toilet
programme.desc: Lifelong pals and criminals Timothy Fletcher and Doni Brown break out of a Florida prison in 2009. Anxious for freedom, the two need money. A robbery that ends in murder puts them on most wanted lists and leads cops on a manhunt across the Southeast.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Pen Pal
programme.desc: Brenda Wynn is out of prison, and wants a new life. But when a co-worker steels her money, she snaps and hits him with her car. Wynn does all she can to stay out of jail by using fake credit cards and conning men into giving her money.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through a Toilet
programme.desc: Lifelong pals and criminals Timothy Fletcher and Doni Brown break out of a Florida prison in 2009. Anxious for freedom, the two need money. A robbery that ends in murder puts them on most wanted lists and leads cops on a manhunt across the Southeast.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Roll the Dice
programme.desc: With 41 arrests and no convictions, Philip Williams had no worries that stabbing his ex in a parking lot would give him any trouble. But when he became a wanted man, he hit the road. Surviving on his gambling wins, Williams kept on the move.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make It in the Big Easy
programme.desc: Jeremy Woods convinced his girlfriend to forge bad checks and then murdered her and her son.

programme.title: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb.'

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Explore the truth behind the stories of Pocahontas, Lewis and Clark and the women's suffrage movement.

programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury
programme.desc: A Tennessee native is building her dream home in Brentwood, but the steep elevation of her new lot poses a challenge for the build. Kyle and Justin create a lavish pool, accented by six fire features, a beautiful vanishing edge and two tanning ledges.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Game Time
programme.desc: After dealing with hot summers and limited options for swimming, a Tennessee father has decided it's time to get a pool of his own. The Pool Kings are up for the task and create a sports pool that will provide endless entertainment.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: Tony and Paul help a couple build their dream pool to go along with their newly built outdoor entertaining space. The guys are challenged to design around a giant concrete slab by creating a feature-packed pool that fits with the new space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Build the Pool and They Will Come
programme.desc: Grandparents want an irresistible pool to ensure the grandkids will want to spend plenty of time at their new place. Steve and Justin come through with a beautiful raised pool design featuring a huge deck that triples the entertaining space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Custom Contemporary
programme.desc: Matt and Jen want to tear out their old deck and rebuild their backyard to match the hill country modern vibe they love and give them a place to enjoy quality family time.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All About the View
programme.desc: Steve and Justin are determined to convert a couple's neglected '80s-style pool into a modern lakeside paradise, but hidden engineering issues make this build more complicated than it seems.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ponds Have More Fun
programme.desc: A Texas family wants a one-of-a-kind, natural-looking cocktail pool. The guys prove they are masters of the country pond when they build an expansive creek waterfall, natural rock steps, sunken boulders and custom concealed skimmers.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Fire Masters: A Fiery Fiesta
programme.desc: Three chefs bring their best flame game to the arena for a blazing battle. The Crossfire Round ignites some serious creativity, and the final feast is a fiery fiesta for judges Nicole Gomes, Sarah Grueneberg and Amy Mills.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Opa! On Open Fire
programme.desc: An international-inspired signature dish sees one chef's dream of winning the competition go up in flames. The Crossfire Round offers a chance to 'ketchup', and judges Andy Husbands, Eddie Jackson and Andrea Nicholson enjoy Greek feasts.

programme.title: Fire Masters: For the Love of Chuck
programme.desc: The chefs serve up meaty mains in the signature dish round. In the crossfire round, they must up their game. Later, in the feast of fire round, the inspiration is la dolce vita.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Smoke, Spice and Everything Nice
programme.desc: The competition spices up in in the Crossfire Round, and in the Feast of Fire, the chefs try to keep calm and curry on.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Steak It to the Limit
programme.desc: There's a barbecue battle in the Fire Masters Arena for a shot at $10,000. The competition really beefs up in the Crossfire Round, and the Feast of Fire serves up ultimate comfort food to judges Connie DeSousa, Ray Lampe and Hugh Mangum.

programme.title: Fire Masters: A Love-Heat Relationship
programme.desc: The competition is fiery and fierce in the Wildfire Round as the chefs must reimagine pantry staples for a shot at a spot in the final round.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Raising the Steaks
programme.desc: In this epic season finale, three chefs are fired up, as they compete for charities near and dear to their hearts. It’s an emotional battle on the barbeques for a shot at $10,000 for those in need.
