programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Fix-It-All
programme.desc: Clients take matters into their own hands and our vets have a slew of do-it-yourself doctoring to repair. As if they're not busy enough at the clinic, Dr. Pol, Diane and Charles embark on some ambitious home improvement projects at the lake house.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hook, Feline and Sinker
programme.desc: From gimpy goats to belligerent bulls, families all around are relying on Pol Veterinary Service to take care of their animals this summer.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dog-a-POL-ooza
programme.desc: It’s all dogs all day this week at Pol Veterinary Services. Dogs are an incredibly important part of the Pols’ life, as both personal pets and clients. From unclaimed strays to nosey farm dogs, there’s no pup Dr. Pol and crew won’t treat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Knights of the Round Stable
programme.desc: Over at the Michigan Renaissance Festival, Dr. Pol takes a look at the hooves of a limping horse named Maverick, a jousting giant scheduled to compete at that day's tournament.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Squeal of Fortune
programme.desc: It's Dr. Pols birthday, but before the celebrations can begin, there's a bevy of cases for the Pol Veterinary staff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: One Hot Llama
programme.desc: The leaves have changed and the first hints of winter appear in central Michigan. Dr. Pol and the PVS crew are still hard at work servicing the farms and small animal owners of Isabella County and the surrounding areas.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Imhotep's Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Ghost Forest
programme.desc: Bizarre markings are seen from space in oceans and deserts across the planet.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden

programme.desc: A lone survivor is the only witness who can help police track down a serial killer known as the Grim Sleeper, who preys on women in South Central Los Angeles. After decades of searching, police hone in on an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Diabolical: Evil Sister Act
programme.desc: When Samuel Johnson Jr. suddenly vanishes, San Antonio investigators find themselves face-to-face with two sisters who know something. Through a series of interrogations, they reveal an elaborate murder plot meticulously engineered by a puppeteer.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lie For Me
programme.desc: Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears along with his savings of $206,000. Detectives discover a woman named Kwaneta Harris has been draining the man's accounts. But as they dig deeper, detectives uncover a massive conspiracy of greed and murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe
programme.desc: A young family in La Mirada, CA is out for an evening stroll when terror strikes. For investigation nothing seems to add up. Is it random violence or a mastermind at work? The truth will take years to emerge.

programme.title: Diabolical: When All Else Fails
programme.desc: After her home is invaded and her husband murdered, Shaunna Dodd recounts her harrowing ordeal at gunpoint. But when investigators dig deeper, they uncover a tale of lies, infidelity, and shady characters who have wandered into the Washoe Valley.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Needs Enemies
programme.desc: A cold morning in December starts off like any other until a rural farmer discovers the body of a dead woman. What seems like a sadistic rape and murder turns into a conspiracy and before long the diabolical nature of someone close is revealed.

programme.title: Diabolical: Weeping Widow
programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: See No Evil: On Her Watch
programme.desc: On March 18th, 2011, 32-year-old Patty Ayala is murdered at the Burger King where she works. Police find the safe open and a mysterious message next to Patty's body. They turn to surveillance video - and it's there the killer emerges from the shadows.

programme.title: See No Evil: Last Look of Summer
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a Texas landfill, detectives race to discover the killer behind the brutal crime. With no leads, police turn to their only witnesses: video cameras that captured the murderer's chilling attempt to cover his tracks.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: In September 2015, Edward Lowry is found savagely beaten and stabbed to death in a parking lot in South Dakota. With little evidence left behind at the scene, can police painstakingly piece together Ed's last moments from CCTV to find his killer?

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Presidential Special
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Burqueños
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante is in Albuquerque, to meet one of the world’s fastest growing prison gangs – The Burqueños.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: Documenting the life of the money-loving mafia man Joe Colombo, who campaigned against harassment of Italian-Americans in the 1970s.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Burqueños
programme.desc: Lou Ferrante is in Albuquerque, to meet one of the world’s fastest growing prison gangs – The Burqueños.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Living Through Renovations on North Padre Island, Texas
programme.desc: Fallon and Mark Jennings are Texas natives with a big Texas family, and they're on the hunt for the perfect waterside home on North Padre Island.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programme.desc: Carrie and Lee have been splitting their time between Nashville and Destin, Florida but they want to get their two sons out of the city and into the sunshine - permanently.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Going Big in Galveston, Texas
programme.desc: Mike, Mariellen and their two sons have vacationed in Galveston, Texas, for years, and now they're ready to buy a beach home of their own. Broker Barbara Zimmerman is here to help them find a house with a boat lift for fisherman Mike.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Outer Banks Overhaul in North Carolina
programme.desc: Audra and Jason have been renting in North Carolina's Outer Banks for years, but they're ready to put their stamp on a house of their own. Their dream renovation includes gutting the kitchen, creating an open floor plan and an updated game room.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Mike and the crew start a new home that was left half-finished by a contractor and find tons of problems behind the walls. Michael and designer Kimm go shopping for flooring with some furry friends, and Sherry and Cali take baby steps getting to work.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Healthy Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Mike shocks the owner of the 'twice done house' when he discovers mold in her attic. Then, the exterior of the half done house gets a major facelift while Sherry and designer Kimm shop for quartz for the bathroom and fireplace.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Art Of Darkness II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic cocoa powder show with three updated dishes including a new twist on brownies, an introduction to black cardamom and a scientific road race.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Flat Is Beautiful II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown gives the 'reload' treatment to a show about flattened meat dishes, including a new chicken piccata and a chicken Kiev that's actually a schnitzel.

programme.title: Cake Wars: The Sound of Music

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Philadelphia
programme.desc: From iconic cheese steaks to stromboli, Andrew uncovers Philly's famous edibles.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston
programme.desc: American history is illustrious in Boston, Massachusetts, and here, Andrew explores its legendary cuisine: from New England clam chowder and scrod to the hotel where Boston cream pie and Parker House rolls were invented.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New York City
programme.desc: New York City is a melting pot of various ethnicities and culinary fusion. Andrew explores the iconic foods from the Big Apple like mile-high pastrami sandwiches, bagels and lox, pizza by the slice and the American hamburger.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: NOLA
programme.desc: New Orleans is a vibrant, eclectic city and its cuisine has been fused with a multitude of culinary influences. Andrew Zimmern explores the classic dishes from po' boys and gumbo to oysters Rockefeller and bananas Foster.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: St. Louis
programme.desc: As the Gateway to the West, St. Louis has built a reputation for homegrown goodness on the backs of its hard-working people. Andrew Zimmern explores such edible icons as St. Louis-style BBQ, toasted ravioli and gooey butter cake.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Detroit, Michigan

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana

programme.title: Man v. Food: Los Angeles, California
programme.desc: Casey travels to sunny Los Angeles for some epic eats including a 2.5-pound fusion burrito loaded with every ingredient in the kitchen and drenched in hot sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Movie: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: An accident between a sweet bookshop worker and a handsome stranger leaves him without his memory.

programme.title: Movie: Road to Christmas
programme.desc: A woman finds herself producing a Christmas special for her network, alongside the son of the show's star. When things go awry, the true meaning of Christmas is uncovered.

programme.title: Movie: Men in Black II
programme.desc: Two secret agents are called in to battle an alien disguised as a lingerie model.

programme.title: Movie: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: History is altered and planet earth jeopardised when an alien kills a top-secret agent in 1969. The agent's partner must travel back in time and work with a younger version of the murdered agent to restore the timeline and save humankind.

programme.title: Movie: Men in Black
programme.desc: A savvy NYPD cop is recruited by a secret government organization to help control Earth's alien population.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: The boys travel to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the 'Getting Gay with Kids' choir tour.

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig
programme.desc: The boys are trapped in a cave and Cartman finds a treasure. Meanwhile, Al Gore shows up in town to warn the citizens about the threat of ManBearPig.

programme.title: South Park: Worldwide Recorder Concert
programme.desc: The children of South Park are invited to Arkansas for the 'Four Million Child Blow 2000,' the first worldwide recorder concert. When Cartman discovers the 'brown noise,' he changes the music for the concert, causing a very smelly mess.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: The Coon
programme.desc: 'The Coon' rises from the trash and takes his place as a lone vigilante who wipes out crime in the town of South Park. When another superhero encroaches on his territory, The Coon seeks out some unlikely allies.

programme.title: South Park: Fourth Grade
programme.desc: Fearing their new teacher, Miss Choksondik, the kids build a time machine from Timmy's electronic wheelchair to travel back in time to the glory days of the third grade.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland
programme.desc: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland. Meanwhile, Kyle is aghast at Cartman getting his dreams, and renounces his faith.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.title: South Park: Tom's Rhinoplasty
programme.desc: While Mr. Garrison deserts the class for a visit to Tom's Rhinoplasty, Stan, Kyle, Kenny, and Cartman all try to become lesbians to get the attention of Ms. Ellen, the new substitute teacher.

programme.title: South Park: Cow Days
programme.desc: South Park's 14th Annual Cow Days rodeo and carnival is here and the boys are determined to win Terrance and Phillip dolls. Meanwhile, someone has stolen the Cow Memorial statue, and newcomers Tom and Mary are blamed for the theft.

programme.title: The Closer: Hostile Witness
programme.desc: Brenda thinks she has finally cornered her long-time nemesis Philip Stroh when his latest client shows signs of cracking under pressure but a shocking courtroom maneuver by Brenda puts the entire case in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Closer: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: Provenza gets trapped into helping his first ex-wife recover her wedding ring after she got ripped off by a shady gold buyer. He once again finds himself in a professionally embarrassing situation.

programme.title: The Closer: Drug Fiend
programme.desc: In a case that hits too close to home for Brenda, a well-liked cancer doctor is brutally killed and his drug supply wiped clean. To make matters worse, Captain Raydor has a new assignment that leaves Brenda questioning her loyalty to Pope.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Jane and the team investigate what appears to be a modern-day witch hunt in Salem. Meanwhile, Frankie's old girlfriend returns to town with a surprise and Jane has no problem speaking her mind about the problem.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: My Own Worst Enemy
programme.desc: Jane and Maura delve into a family's background when a man is killed in what appears to be a mugging gone wrong. Meanwhile, a romantic and mysterious figure from Maura's past shows up, causing a rift when Jane suspects Maura is hiding something.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Gone Daddy Gone
programme.desc: When a young, female dockworker is found dead, the team discovers that the dock has mob connections that may lead to Maura's biological father. Meanwhile, Jane tries to evade sensitivity training and Maura starts spending time with Jane's brother.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Every Moment Counts
programme.desc: Loved by Grey's Anatomy fans for his role as Denny, actor Jeffrey Dean Morgan hosts a one-hour highlight special.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Time After Time
programme.desc: Izzie faces her past and finds comfort in George; Alex becomes more attached to Jane Doe, Meredith and Derek question their own status and Cristina resolved to fight for her relationship with Burke, despite her past with Colin Marlow.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Desire
programme.desc: The interns of Seattle Grace cram for their upcoming exam; the attendings vie for the Chief's position; Burke struggles to involve Cristina in the wedding plans, things heat up between Addison and Alex and Derek questions his relationship with Meredith.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Makani desperately pushes through the broiling valley to find a new tribe. Ryan hatches a high-risk plan to get a kill. Suzanne plots her exit from Seth, but Africa's heat thwarts her plan and forces a survivalist to leave the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode
programme.desc: An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival by banishing herself from Seth. Bulent wards off hyenas and baboons. On a two-day hunting mission, Ryan's surrounded by deadly predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: A Matter of Life or Seth
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: Suzanne makes a new start after leaving Seth, but struggles in the brutal heat. Barehanded Killer Bulent takes on a monitor lizard. A tribe plots a move that could transform the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Keep Your Frenemies Close
programme.desc: Wes scores another kill, but when a large group enters their camp, the win creates tension. A desperate Bulent migrates to Seth's watering hole. Seth is open to a partnership but Bulent remains solo and quickly gets a major food win in Seth's backyard.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Foreign Exchange: Crushed in Croatia
programme.desc: Maxence and Julie are dropped deep in the Croatian wilderness in a hunting ground to bears, wolves, wild boars and vipers. Tensions rise quickly, but in an environment so challenging they have to make it work. Their journey is translated into English.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Watch Party: Fernando and Samantha
programme.desc: Survivalists Fernando Calderon and Samantha Pearson re-connect virtually and watch their challenge in the Malaysian rainforest. They offer fresh perspective and new insights as they battle hypothermia, starvation and bloodthirsty insects.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bite Club
programme.desc: A survivor of rattlesnake, shark and bear attacks teams with Brooke, wife of 'Naked and Afraid' veteran Matt Wright, in a vicious African feeding ground. Then, a haunted Colombian jungle tests survivalists with threats from predators and the supernatural.

programme.desc: Steve transforms a 1955 Chevy truck into an apocalyptic vision of fire.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: To Hell You Ride
programme.desc: The Welderup crew pays tribute to the railroad that put the West on the map by building a rat rod with a train theme for a client from Telluride. It's all about locomotives, rivets, and even a train whistle for this road warrior.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: Jazzed About a '57 Gasser
programme.desc: Thomas makes a profit flipping a car Richard turned his nose up at. Meanwhile, Thomas and Scot pick up solid a '57 Chevy for their next build. Later, the shop is threatened when a tree falls on it, ruining their office and crushing a customer's truck.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: Jazzed About a '57 Gasser
programme.desc: Richard surprises FU garage with a rundown trailer as a replacement office. Scot has a buyer for the '57 gasser and gives the crew a two-week deadline, but things come to a halt after Thomas builds an engine that's unacceptable with the other partners.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: Furious '65 Fastback: Part I
programme.desc: The Misfits open house is shut down by Richard Rawlings. Thomas picks up a rare Ford Torino Cobra. Up a creek without a project car, the team hastily buys a '65 Mustang fastback. Meanwhile, Thomas finds a '69 Barracuda that he allows Tom to fix.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: Furious '65 Fastback: Part II
programme.desc: The mustang comes back from paint and the guys get to work. A trip to Gas Monkey to use a tool costs them extra money when Richard catches them and invoices them. Things take a bigger turn for the worst when Soupbone gets white paint on the hood.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Big Bro Bus
programme.desc: A new client asks for the biggest build yet: a monster school bus capable of driving over sand and water. Later, the Muscle brings in his own client build for a gym buddy, a Raptor-style F250.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: School Is in Session
programme.desc: A client wants a school bus that can drive over sand and water.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Defender
programme.desc: Major league pitcher Jacob deGrom needs his OBS Ford revamped. The guys convert a British Land Rover defender from right hand drive to left hand drive.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: De-ice Ice Baby
programme.desc: They guys convert a Land Rover Defender from right hand to left hand drive for their lawyer. Heavy D parts out a military airplane de-icer.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Back With a Kodiak
programme.desc: Diesel Dave picks his first giveaway truck and dreams big attempting to build the 2020 version of the Kodiak. Todd LeDuc challenges the guys to a desert race and flips the script by picking The Muscle to be on his team.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: A Kraken Kodiak
programme.desc: Diesel Dave continues work on his epic modern-day Kodiak while making sure he doesn't break the bank. Sam the Mad Scientist then unveils 'The Kraken,' a diesel-powered monowheel vehicle that is unlike anything the guys have ever seen.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Release the Kraken
programme.desc: Mad Scientist Sam's wild creation, The Kraken, comes to life but Heavy D continues to be skeptical of the build's potential viral success. A high profile client wants to customize a Ram 3500, which puts Diesel Dave and The Muscle to the test.

programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy go house hunting in L.A. but with pricier real estate and small square footage, they may not be able to find the perfect place. Meanwhile in Arkansas, the family is going camping. Later at dinner, one couple makes a special announcement.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What Now?: New Beginnings

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies
programme.desc: A couple is suspected of killing a deer during off-season. Warden Iles transports orphaned baby armadillos for rehabilitation, and Warden Gould searches for a mountain lion that is lurking near a recreational park in Laredo.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Drug Run River
programme.desc: Game wardens Gould and Hickerson chase drug smugglers that crossed the Rio Grande River. Game warden Boone checks out an injured bird. Game warden Damron relocates a feisty marsupial and her babies. Amundson and Poole meet a fan.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Old Warrants Die Hard
programme.desc: A game warden has a run-in with an acrobatic squirrel. A Mexican shrimp boat may have an illegal catch. Fishing without a license leads to a trip to jail. A mystery UTV caught-on-tape has a surprising driver. Some kids are found in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lying Dogs
programme.desc: The Game Wardens patrol the beach, lake and land, as summer is in full swing. Wardens educate a dog owner about leaving pets in the sun. An under-age drinker tells too many lies. Wardens inspect novice jet skiers on a busy recreational lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers
programme.desc: Game Warden McGee rushes to a domestic altercation. Game Wardens Zuniga and Roel run into trespassers, while Provasnik inspects a potentially stolen jet ski. Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up on an investigation, and a baby squirrel is rescued.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Run and You're Done
programme.desc: It's dove season in Texas, the start of hunting season. In Beaumont, road hunters get an early start on deer season during a decoy sting. Near Texarkana, a rogue gator is lassoed. On the Gulf Coast, undersized angling means citations.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: New Blood
programme.desc: Two new rookies from the 59th cadet class of Texas Game Wardens work their first cases. Game wardens rescue softshell turtles caught on illegal trotlines on Llano River. In East Texas, the search is on for a hunter lost in the Big Thicket Preserve.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator Bait
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens search for an alligator that bit a man and his 13-year old son. In West Texas, an abandoned car leads the Wardens to believe a teenage girl may be missing. A man is suspected of hunting on his neighbor's property without permission.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm Before the Storm
programme.desc: Across Texas, boating and fishing patrols are interrupted by record storms and flooding. Near Austin, Search and Rescue teams save multiple people from dangerous swift water and tornadoes. Wardens chase a felon with an illegal gun in East Texas.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gulf Recon
programme.desc: A specialty team of Texas Game Wardens spends a week on a floating cabin to stop drug smuggling operations across the border. The K-9 unit is called in to investigate a woman who may be killing owls to sell exotic headdresses.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Sky Diver's Nightmare
programme.desc: In Austin, a professional skydiver, is being terrorized by his two high-flying Savannahs. Wolfie, a Maine Coon, is notorious for pooping all over Heather and Bijan's house and then covers up the evidence with their belongings.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Blood Thirsty
programme.desc: A couple is at odds over their vicious cat Coco. Foley, a cat with night terrors, is driving a wedge between newlyweds Joseph and Ruth.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Surprise Attack Cat!
programme.desc: Littlez is a black cat that's a big terror. Whisky will poop anywhere in the house, even on Kate and Cameron.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Einstein Hates Izzy
programme.desc: Einstein is the perfect cat until he sees Izzy and then goes into full out-to-kill attack mode. Scott and Tiffani need their cat to stop his hell cat behaviour before their baby is born.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Scared to Laugh
programme.desc: Symone is already an aggressive cat, but the sound of Kelly laughing or crying launches her into a bloodthirsty attack. Also, Alex is afraid that her mom will get rid of her cat when she leaves for college.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Puma on the Rampage
programme.desc: When John married Samantha, he committed to for better or for worse, but he didn't realize her cat Puma would put their vows to the test. Jimmy and Maggie have been married for 45 years, but their 8-year-old snowshoe cat is tearing them apart.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Stalking Miss Daisy
programme.desc: The minute Dexter entered the house, he was out to kill Daisy. Corey got Giver for Sarah's birthday, but this is one gift he'd like to give back.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Mama Mia!
programme.desc: Parents Greg and Dina have three loving children and one vicious cat named Mia. Chris and Tenille are in love, but the only thing keeping them from moving in together is Tenille's cat, Precious, who is anything but.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Demon Cat

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: NASA's Greatest Moments

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Master Key Murder
programme.desc: The charming town of Macon, GA panics when Mercer Law grad Lauren Giddings is murdered on campus. Detectives uncover multiple suspects with motive and means. But only one person in the group is sadistic enough to kill.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hanging by a Thread
programme.desc: Tanya Buschman is just getting out of a nasty marriage when she falls for handsome Michel Bérubé, a bartender in Montreal. But it's not long before jealousy becomes foreplay for a suspicious suicide that has friends pointing fingers at friends.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: In a Lonely Place
programme.desc: Michael Dally and Sherri Guess are a perfect match. But when Michael takes up with an alluring colleague named Diana in a not-so-secret affair, the fear of divorce will lead the couple down a dark path of jealousy, abuse, conspiracy… And human sacrifice.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Accident
programme.desc: High school baseball coach Russell Stager is only separated from his wife for a few months when he meets Barbara. But less than a decade later, marital bliss will be replaced with a web of lies and betrayal that will push someone over the edge.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Harmony in Polyamory
programme.desc: An open-minded foursome soon discovers there's no harmony in polyamory, and someone will pay the ultimate price for free love.

programme.title: 9/11: The Falling Man: 9/11: The Falling Man
programme.desc: The story of the unforgettable photograph of a 9/11 'jumper.' It follows the trail of the photographer who nearly lost his life shooting the image and a journalist who committed himself to uncovering the falling man's identity.

programme.title: Capturing Bin Laden
programme.desc: Capturing bin Laden tracks the rise and fall of Osama bin Laden, a man who spent the decade following the September 11 attacks at the top of America's most wanted list.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched
programme.desc: The story of that day through the unflinching eye of ABC News, as the network's anchors and reporters rushed to the scenes of chaos and embarked on what would become an extraordinary 83 hours of live coverage.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched
programme.desc: The story of that day through the unflinching eye of ABC News, as the network's anchors and reporters rushed to the scenes of chaos and embarked on what would become an extraordinary 83 hours of live coverage.

programme.title: Capturing Bin Laden
programme.desc: Capturing bin Laden tracks the rise and fall of Osama bin Laden, a man who spent the decade following the September 11 attacks at the top of America's most wanted list.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving a Rare Log Springhouse
programme.desc: Mark and the guys wade in the water to save a dilapidated Springhouse. Johnny and Tim go exploring while Mark and Graham clean up the spring. Back on the boneyard, they rebuild the Springhouse and finish the inside of the Container Cabin!

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Cottage
programme.desc: The guys turn a brand new storage shed into an 1800s log cabin, then drive it to Round Top, Texas. Mark gets a lesson from a local silversmith, and the team visits historic structures built around the state by 19th-century pioneers.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Shaver-Haley Home: The Whole Story
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders save a West Virginia family's log home just days before the bulldozer gets it.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Mark Finds His Dream Home Barn
programme.desc: After years of searching, Mark Bowe has found the barn he wants to turn into his own home. The guys work carefully to take apart the enormous bank barn without breaking any of the beams. Mark visits a nearby barn that has been transformed for weddings.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Cabin at a Crossroads
programme.desc: Mark finds a cabin from a unique moment in history when pioneers started using new technology: the sawmill. Later, Mark visits another West Virginia cabin filled with family memories.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Antique barns and cabins are salvaged and the wood reused for stunning modern homes.

programme.title: West End Salvage: The West End Salvage Team Creates The Ultimate Bachelor Pad
programme.desc: Daniel doesn't know what to do with his tiny eight hundred square foot downtown loft. He wants his place to function as a living room, dining room and home office, so he's hired the team at West End Salvage.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Two Yurts and a Gazebo
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny work with a couple who want a 30-foot yurt with a loft, a gazebo and a smaller yurt bathroom. The huge project is on a tight, one-week deadline and an even tighter $60,000 budget.

programme.title: Love Yurts: A Nautical Yurt
programme.desc: A couple with a love for the ocean is looking for a yurt, and Nathan and Jenny are up to the task. The build schedule is put at risk, however, when Jenny loses her voice and rain pours in while the yurt goes up.

programme.title: Love Yurts: A Jewel of a Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny design a new home for a jewelry maker and her son. The team will have to pull an all nighter to complete the yurt on time after fierce rains and a mismeasurement put the build far behind schedule.

programme.title: Love Yurts: Nathan's Dream Yurt
programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny design the ultimate man cave for a musician and his friend. They go all out, giving the yurt indoor skate ramps, a refurbished pool table and a stage complete with drums and guitars.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: What's Up Dock?
programme.desc: Lucas builds a giant pool for a dear friend-turned client. Lucas creates a dream backyard with a dock, cascading waterfalls a fire pit and audio/visual entertainment swim-up bar.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Piña Pool-ada
programme.desc: Lucas creates a tropical oasis complete with an island, a large grotto rock and a Tiki-themed cabana.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' Pools
programme.desc: Lucas Congdon and his team at Lucas Lagoons build custom pools and gardens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Tropical Twists
programme.desc: There's nothing like kicking back in the tropics.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Fertile Fields to the Red River Valley
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota where he goes local with the North Woods Sandwich and Barbe-chos, and feels right at home at the Red River Valley Fair with the Redneck Taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Portland Rose Festival and Got to Be NC Fair
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe is in Portland to try beef tongue tacos. He then heads to North Carolina for a donut sloppy Joe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meadowlands State Fair/ Gardendale Magnolia Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples the freak show food of New Jersey and tries southern sweep potato pie ice cream.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California State Fair/ Northeast State Fair
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chows down on a lobster corn dog in California, and tries a deep fried peanut butter and banana sandwich in Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Stanislaus County Fair/ Texas Crab Fest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Stanislaus County Fair in Turlock, California. He gets his paws into homemade fries topped with lobster claws and tail meat, and devours a delicious donut ice cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King's Peach
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the Big Fresno Fair in California, where local legend Chicken Charlie has a triple treat stacked up on a stick.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Tasty Childhood Favorites
programme.desc: Tiffani takes a walk down memory lane with friends French Stewart, Nicole Sullivan and Nate Berkus, putting a modern twist on favorites from her youth. Tiffani's updated Turkey Meatloaf is always a hit.

programme.title: Dinner at Tiffani's: Asian Inspiration
programme.desc: Tiffani stirs up an Asian-inspired menu for her husband, Brady Smith, plus friends Marguerite Moreau and Christopher Redman. Homemade Spring Rolls with Spicy Peanut Sauce and Nuoc Cham Sauce is the perfect start to any night in.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch for a Bunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is always prepared with this crowd-pleasing brunch menu.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Sizzling South Beach Brunch

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southern Comfort Brunch

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Tasty Trattoria Brunch
programme.desc: Decadent cinnamon mascarpone pancakes with warm morello cherries and hazelnut.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Mama Mia, What a Meatball!
programme.desc: Inspired by his mom's cooking, Michael Symon masters chicken parmesan meatballs on the grill. Later, Symon's wife Liz joins him to cook soft polenta over their fire pit. Then, Liz makes a simple vinegar and cream dressing for Michael's mom's garden salad.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mac and Cheese and Monster Meat
programme.desc: Noah takes a bite out of the Great New York State Fair where The Defibrillator gets his heart pumping. Then he tries on two local favorites -- the piquant Buffalo chicken mac and cheese and the crispy clamwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Waffle Truth
programme.desc: Noah Cappe welcomes the changing of the seasons at the Circleville Pumpkin Show in Ohio, where pumpkin stars in both savory and sweet treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival Of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies On The Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.desc: Doc must help Lambie remove the lint from her plush in time for her to be a part of Professor Hootsburgh's plush portrait painting. Then, Moo-Moo accidentally gets ripped when she's left at Doc's house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma

programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Wilson vs. McKnight
programme.desc: A scorned Detroit woman summons her lover and his wife to Paternity Court to prove that he fathered her one-year-old daughter.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Wedding Dress Pinned Me Down/ Drowned Out Birdie
programme.desc: Faulty tailoring ruins a wedding dress; owner of a bird accuses his friend of negligence.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Curbside Sex
programme.desc: Jimmy loves his fiancée Jess and the two have been together for five years. What once was a good relationship has seemingly went downhill. Jimmy suspects that something is awry but it’s on Jess now to confess for her deeds!

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The Plaintiff met the Defendant online. They went on a few dates, but during their second date, he claims she ignored him. He’s suing her for a loan and court costs. The woman says he was intoxicated and that the loan was a gift.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Taking From A Tenant ', ' Taxing A Client' and 'Taking Way Too Long.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Taking Off On A Friend ', 'Taking Too Much Money' and 'Treading On Thin Water.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: My Horrible Roommate/ Wrong Live Telegram
programme.desc: A woman sues for losing her security deposit due to messiness, then, a woman sues for receiving the wrong singing telegram.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A pastor is suing for defamation; the defendant says the pastor is harassing him. Then, the plaintiff says the neighbour's dog attacked her emotional support dog, leaving her with medical bills.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Uncle Raped Me When I Was a Child
programme.desc: Cece says her uncle assaulted her when she was a child, but he denies everything. Tiffany believes that her stepfather, Darryl, has sexually molested her four year old son.

programme.title: Maury: My Teen Wife Cheats ... Am I Her Baby's Father?
programme.desc: Savannah needs to save her marriage by proving her husband is the father of her son. Anthony and Broderick both think they're the father of Essence's daughter. Jessica hooked up with another man while on a break from Richard, and now needs a DNA test.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Despicable Men
programme.desc: Lissy is here to tell the man she loves, Darriel, to leave his girlfriend Shana once and for all. Darriel insists she's stalking him and he doesn't want her. Plus, Precious' boyfriend cheated on her with her former cellmate.

programme.title: Maury: Sisters at War, How Many of Them Slept With My Fiancé?
programme.desc: Jamie has been searching for answers that could change her life forever. She fears her fiancé, Andre has cheated on her with not one, but two of her sisters.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: Down to You
programme.desc: A man finds the girl of his dreams only to discover that she is not ready for commitment.

programme.title: Movie: Tumbledown
programme.desc: The widow of a folk singing legend has her heart open to the possibility of love when a writer comes to her small town hoping to convince her to let him write her late husband's story.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: One Night Stand: Bill Burr
programme.desc: Up-and-coming talent as well as seasoned performers take the stage before a live audience.

programme.title: Movie: War Dogs
programme.desc: During the Iraq War, two friends in their early 20s bid on U.S. Military contracts to get rich, and win a $300-million deal to arm the Afghan Military. The new deal puts them in business with dangerous and shady characters.

programme.title: Movie: In Her Shoes
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters, with opposite dispositions, find out what bonds them together after meeting the grandmother they never knew existed.

programme.title: Movie: Overnight Delivery
programme.desc: Convinced of his girlfriend's infidelity, a man sends a much-regretted poison-pen letter.

programme.title: Movie: Weird Science
programme.desc: Two high school computer hackers set out to create the woman of their dreams, and succeed.

programme.title: Movie: Shaft
programme.desc: A cybersecurity expert investigates his friend's suspicious death.

programme.title: Flight of the Conchords: Live in London
programme.desc: Ten years after the debut of their critically-acclaimed HBO show musical comedians Bret McKenzie and Jemaine Clement return with an all-new comedy special, showcasing the duo's ability to mix humour and original songs.

programme.title: Movie: Man of the House
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy tries everything to drive away his mother's new boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Movie: The Nice Guys
programme.desc: In 1970s Los Angeles, private eye Holland March is forced to work with a hired enforcer to solve the case of a missing girl and the apparent suicide of a porn star. As their investigation progresses, they uncover the roots of a large conspiracy.
